LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT VICENTE SOTO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. THE STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT WAS IN ENGLISH AND SIGNED BY DEFENDANT. THIS IS PERSUASIVE EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT HAD A SUFFICIENT UNDERSTANDING OF ENGLISH AND UNDERSTOOD THAT PLAINTIFF WAS SEEKING JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHOW HE HAS ANY DEFENSE TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT VICENTE SOTO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT

Appearances:
Vicente Soto (282-1905) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona, assisted with Spanish translation by Julie Metra
Joanna Kozubal (864-6962) specially appearing for plaintiff

Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. The stipulation for settlement was in English and signed by defendant. This is persuasive evidence that defendant had a sufficient understanding of English and understood that plaintiff was seeking judgment. Defendant has failed to show he has any defense to plaintiff's claim. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-08-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES; PARTIES AGREE AND SIGN STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. TRIAL DATE REMOVED.

JPT KOOROSH AFSHARI; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (218).
